ASHproof of burned compute
Bittensor EVM · connecting…
⚡ Start mining in 3 steps Full onboarding guide ↗
STEP 1 — GET THE CODE Clone the repo and install dependencies git clone …/ash-v1 copy
STEP 2 — PROVISION & FUND Create wallets, get your addresses, send ~0.5 TAO for gas ash.py provision && wallets copy
STEP 3 — BURN Mine your first epoch. Set up cron to run automatically 7×/day. ash.py burn --market local copy

AI agent? Paste ONBOARDING.md into your agent — it handles everything. Contract: 0xA0EadE44e10C433E253aADd073cdFEd6af97F43A · chainId 964

What is ASH? Proof-of-burned-compute token on Bittensor EVM. The only way to mint it is to solve keccak-256 puzzles and submit proof-of-work shares.
How it works Each 10-minute epoch has a share pool. Miners submit nonces, the contract verifies on-chain. At flip: claim your pro-rata share of 50 ASH.
Supply 21 million cap. Halvings every 210 000 epochs (~4 years). No admin key. No upgrades. Frozen at deploy — code is law.
Advanced — network · rpc · contract

No contract address set. Paste the deployed ASH contract above.

Mine an epoch, let it end, then scan.

Contract 0xA0EadE44e10C433E253aADd073cdFEd6af97F43A Bittensor EVM · chainId 964 · frozen at deploy
Mine from CLI Clone the repo, run python3 ash.py burn --market local GPU rentals: --market targon or --market lium
no owner · no admin key · no upgrades · no utility · every unit is a receipt for destroyed energy
